markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, SEO, and new collaboration tools.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Workflow:** A new Airtable OS centralizes content management, enabling a faster 5-article/week cadence. Unreviewed articles will now auto-publish to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**SEO Fixes:** A sitemap error (posts mapped to `/post` instead of `/blog`) is being fixed by EOW to unblock Google indexing. This fix will also enable accurate traffic data in Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [**Podcast Summaries:** The new podcast summary format was approved, with key feedback to embed YouTube videos, add a "TLDR" section, and hyperlink chapters to specific timestamps.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [**New Content Ideas:** Understory proposed a "working in public" series on the SEO journey and will create written case studies now for faster publication.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Workflow

  - [**Cadence:** 5 articles/week, with unreviewed articles auto-publishing to maintain speed.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Understory requested direct tags on specific sections needing review, as they cannot read every article in full.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Thumbnail Redesign:** Current AI-generated images are too generic.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [**Goal:** Explore more creative, on-brand options, potentially featuring people (e.g., authors) for a more familiar feel, inspired by the Monograph blog.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX to share new design ideas in 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### SEO & Analytics

  - [**Sitemap Error:** A critical sitemap error is being fixed by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [**Problem:** Posts were mapped to `/post` instead of `/blog`.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [**Impact:** This blocked Google from indexing content, skewing all traffic data.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [**Looker Report:** Traffic data is currently skewed by the sitemap error and a recent Google search result change.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**2025 Sessions:** \~10,000 (higher than Understory expected).](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
      - [**Traffic Source:** \~50/50 split between LinkedIn and Google.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** The Looker report shows Claude and ChatGPT are the top LLM sources for mentions and traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

### New Airtable Content OS

  - [**Purpose:** Centralizes content management for faster feedback and better visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [**`Topics Pending Approval`:** Understory can use dropdowns to approve, revise, or add notes.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [**`Content Calendar`:** Understory can adjust publication dates for future articles.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**`Articles for Review`:** Understory can add notes for specific edits.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)

### New Content Formats

  - [**Podcast Summaries:** The initial draft was approved with key feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Embed the YouTube video directly in the article.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Add a "TLDR" (Too Long; Didn't Read) section.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [Hyperlink chapters to specific timestamps in the YouTube video (GrowthX to investigate feasibility).](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [Add a shout-out section for the guest's company.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
      - [Prioritize older episodes first.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [**Case Studies:** Understory will create written case studies now for faster publication, rather than waiting for video testimonials.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [**"Working in Public" Series:** Alex proposed a series documenting the SEO journey, leveraging the team's combined 35k social media followers.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [Fix the sitemap error by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [Share new thumbnail design ideas in 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [Investigate hyperlinking podcast chapters to YouTube timestamps.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [Implement feedback on the podcast summary format.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [Connect with Kyle to plan the "working in public" series.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [**Understory:**](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [Schedule client case study interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [Share the link to the Adam Robinson webinar recording.](https://fathom.video/share/LDSmzP4uuaT8qgbiKEEnBh_sAJbJwCsE?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
